title: Coords Translator
description:
This mod makes it so you can convert your overworld/nether coords to nether/overworld coords.

/overworldtonether <x> <z> or just /overworldtonether
/nethertooverworld <x> <z> or just /nethertooverworld

sysxo (my friend) made this sysxo on discord
body:
Coords Translator is a mod that lets you translate **nether coordinates** into overworld coordinates and **overworld coordinates** into nether coordinates. It works clientside on every server.

_/nethertooverworld_ **<x> <z>**
_/overworldtonether_ **<x> <z>**
